name: Forgejo (Internal CTI)
description: Internal Forgejo instance bridge via forgejo-mcp SSE server. Exposes issue tracking, file push, workflow dispatch, and PR operations as MCP tools for CTI/threat-intel pipelines. Requires a running forgejo-mcp SSE sidecar (see Dockge stack in enterprise branch).

credentials_required.label: Forgejo MCP SSE Endpoint
credentials_required.hint: URL of the running forgejo-mcp SSE server, e.g. http://forgejo-mcp:8080/sse or http://192.168.101.x:8080/sse

credentials_required.label: Forgejo Personal Access Token
credentials_required.hint: Generate at your Forgejo instance: Settings → Applications → Access Tokens. Scope: repo, issue, write:repository

credentials_optional.label: Forgejo Instance Base URL
credentials_optional.hint: Base URL of your Forgejo instance, e.g. https://forgejo.lab.internal. Used for direct API fallback if SSE server is unreachable.

credentials_optional.label: Verify SSL (true/false)
credentials_optional.hint: Set to false for internal CAs or self-signed certs. Lab environments typically require false.

tools.name: forgejo_create_issue
tools.description: Create a new issue in a Forgejo repository. Use for tracking threat actor TTPs, IOC reports, or pipeline failures.

tools.name: forgejo_update_issue
tools.description: Update an existing issue (title, body, state, labels). Use for updating threat intel tickets.

tools.name: forgejo_create_or_update_file
tools.description: Create or update a file in a Forgejo repository. Use for pushing IOC feeds, STIX bundles, or YARA rules.

tools.name: forgejo_get_file
tools.description: Read a file from a Forgejo repository.

tools.name: forgejo_create_pull_request
tools.description: Open a PR proposing threat intel updates for peer review.

tools.name: forgejo_dispatch_workflow
tools.description: Trigger a Forgejo Actions workflow run. Use to kick off CTI enrichment pipelines on new intel.

tools.name: forgejo_list_workflow_runs
tools.description: List recent Forgejo Actions workflow runs. Use to monitor CTI pipeline health.

tools.name: forgejo_list_notifications
tools.description: List unread Forgejo notifications for the authenticated user.

author: JazenaYLA
notes: This template requires a running forgejo-mcp SSE sidecar. The enterprise branch Dockge compose stack (opt/stacks/forgejo-mcp/) handles this. SSL verification is disabled by default for lab environments with internal CAs — set FORGEJO_VERIFY_SSL=true in production.
